description:
You are a security-oriented log analyst.  
Before you can start correlating events from servers located around the world, you need to capture the **current time-zone and locale settings of the container you are working in** and archive them as immutable evidence.

Target artefact  
• Create (or overwrite, if it already exists) the file  
  /home/user/logs/system_context.log  

Exact required directory permissions  
• /home/user/logs must exist and be accessible for normal users (no root needed).

Exact required file contents  
The file must contain exactly two single-line key=value pairs in the order shown below, each terminated by a single ASCII newline (LF, hex 0x0A), with **no extra leading/trailing whitespace or blank lines**:

TIMEZONE=<tz_string>
LOCALE=<locale_string>

Substitute <tz_string> with the system’s current time-zone identifier (for example “Europe/Berlin” or “Etc/UTC”).  
Substitute <locale_string> with the system’s current primary locale identifier (for example “en_US.UTF-8” or “C.UTF-8”).

Verification details  
Automated tests will:

1. Confirm that /home/user/logs/system_context.log exists.
2. Confirm that the first line starts exactly with “TIMEZONE=” and the second line starts exactly with “LOCALE=” (case-sensitive).
3. Extract the values after the “=” signs and validate them against the container’s active settings at execution time.
4. Ensure there are precisely two newline-terminated lines and nothing else in the file.

Constraint  
• Complete the task with a single compound or piped terminal command of your choice (no multiple independent commands; you may chain utilities within one command line).

When you are done, the only artefact the verifier needs to check is the correctly formatted /home/user/logs/system_context.log file.
truth:
Expected system values inside the container used for grading:

TIMEZONE: Etc/UTC
LOCALE: C.UTF-8

Therefore the correct final file must contain exactly:

TIMEZONE=Etc/UTC
LOCALE=C.UTF-8

with a trailing LF after each line (total file size: 32 bytes including newlines).

Permissions: /home/user/logs/ 0755, system_context.log 0644.
